visualPitch: Iyashikei pastoral TCG — soft anime watercolor backgrounds, healing slice-of-life Japanese countryside

style.aesthetic: iyashikei anime background art, soft watercolor, pastoral Japanese countryside, nostalgic, gentle natural lighting, Studio Ghibli-influenced environments
style.avoid: dark fantasy, horror, violence, gore, neon cyberpunk, harsh contrast, text overlays, watermarks, prominent human characters, logos
style.palette: muted sage greens, sea mist blues, warm sunset ambers, lavender highland skies, rice-paper creams

image.promptSuffix: soft watercolor illustration style, gentle nostalgic mood, detailed environment art, pastoral Japanese countryside, no people, no text, no watermark, 16:9 composition.
image.ctaSuffix: landscape feature illustration for a trading card game website tile, soft watercolor, atmospheric depth, gentle vignette, no text, no watermark, 16:9 composition.
image.gamemodelSuffix: square pillar illustration for a trading card game website section, soft watercolor, centered composition, gentle lighting, no text, no watermark, 1:1 aspect ratio.
image.cardTypeSuffix: square rarity emblem icon for a trading card game UI, soft watercolor, clean silhouette, no text, no watermark, 1:1 aspect ratio.

shinrin.visualIdentity: cedar forests, moss shrines, tea terraces, morning mist, komorebi light rays
shinrin.mood: forest stillness, green tea calm, shrine quiet

naminami.visualIdentity: calm inlets, fishing piers, tidal gardens, dawn and twilight coast
naminami.mood: tide hush, salt air peace, reflective water

akari.visualIdentity: harvest hills, festival lanterns, onsen valleys, golden hour warmth
akari.mood: hearth warmth, festival glow, unhurried dusk

takane.visualIdentity: windmill ridges, cloud pastures, wind chime summits, open highland sky
takane.mood: highland breeze, airy rest, chime clarity

expand-collection.prompt: Layered binder pages and floating trading cards over a misty cedar forest terrace, gentle morning light, collectible TCG mood

buy-cards.prompt: Quiet village market stall with displayed trading cards, calm coastal inlet in background, thoughtful shopping atmosphere

sealed-vaults.prompt: Neat stack of sealed card bundles on a wooden veranda, warm lantern glow, anticipation of opening packs

discover-rare.prompt: Single radiant foil trading card catching sunset light on a hilltop, Sacred tier pull moment, soft sparkle

sell-cards.prompt: Organized card binder with duplicates laid out beside a small coin pouch, peaceful trading desk by a window

shape-strategy.prompt: Deck of trading cards arranged in a curve on tatami beside tea cup, strategy planning mood, soft afternoon light

tactical-battles.prompt: Abstract game board with gentle spirit tokens on a misty pond surface, calm tactical duel atmosphere, no UI chrome

collectible-cards.prompt: Fan of illustrated trading cards over a pastoral ward panorama blending forest, coast, and highland hints

ranked-climb.prompt: Stone path ascending a hill through seasons, metaphor for ladder climb, peaceful determination, distant summit

uncommon.label: Gentle
uncommon.prompt: Soft jade leaf emblem with subtle glow, Gentle print tier icon, iyashikei watercolor style

rare.label: Radiant
rare.prompt: Delicate lavender blossom crest emblem, Radiant print tier icon, iyashikei watercolor style

epic.label: Sacred
epic.prompt: Golden lantern sigil emblem with warm radiance, Sacred print tier icon, iyashikei watercolor style
